text:
There once was a girl named Lily who had a mysterious pet parrot named Percival.

One bright morning, as Lily fed him nuts outside her kitchen window, Percival chirped something unusual. "Lily! I've heard the most extraordinary thing! I think I've cracked an ancient riddle!"

Eager, Lily leaned closer. "What is it?"

"Percival says there's a lost island somewhere out there where there's treasure. All you have to do is find the right riddle."

Lily's eyes lit up. "Could I search for it?"

"I dare say!"

So off Lily went. She set to solving riddles. There was one about owls; another about music. At last, she heard one she loved.

"A cat sits on a hat?"

She nodded eagerly. "That's it!"

They sailed away together, but no treasure. Just a heart that swelled with love for Percival's curious tales.
